description: 构建 Bridge 配置模型与持久化层

children.description: 在 src/main/ 下新建 bridge-store.ts，定义 BridgeConfig/BridgeMethod 接口及默认配置
children.evidence: Created src/main/bridge-store.ts with BridgeConfig/BridgeMethod interfaces, default config, getConfig/setConfig/exportConfig/importConfig methods, persisted to userData/bridge-config.json

children.description: 实现 getConfig/setConfig/exportConfig/importConfig 方法，持久化到 JSON

description: 创建 Bridge preload 脚本用于注入目标页面（改用 executeJavaScript 方式）

children.description: 在 browser-manager.ts 中实现 injectBridge() 方法
children.evidence: Implemented injectBridge() using webContents.executeJavaScript() — builds dynamic bridge object from config

children.description: 在 did-finish-load 事件中自动注入 bridge
children.evidence: Added did-finish-load listeners in open() for both toolbar and non-toolbar modes

description: 更新 BrowserManager 启用 Bridge 注入

children.description: 在 open() 中移除 preload 注入逻辑，保留 sandbox: true
children.evidence: Reverted WebContentsView and BrowserWindow to original sandbox: true config, removed BridgeManager.getBridgePreload()

children.description: 实现 refreshBridge() 重新注入 bridge
children.evidence: refreshBridge() now calls injectBridge() again — no page reload needed

description: 新增 Bridge IPC 通道与主进程 API

children.description: 在 src/main/index.ts 注册 bridge IPC handlers
children.evidence: Registered async handlers bridge:get-config/set-config/export-config/import-config. Removed unused sync handler.

children.description: 在 preload/index.ts 暴露 bridgeApi 并更新类型声明
children.evidence: Added bridgeApi with getConfig/setConfig/exportConfig/importConfig, exposed via contextBridge, updated index.d.ts types

description: Browser 页面新增 Bridge 配置 UI

children.description: 在 browser.tsx 中新增 Bridge 配置面板（开关、globalName、方法列表）
children.evidence: Added Bridge config panel in browser.tsx with toggle, global name input, method list with add/remove, accept params/code mode checkboxes, returnValue textarea

children.description: 实现导入/导出 JSON 功能
children.evidence: Export: Blob download as bridge-config.json. Import: hidden file input + bridgeApi.importConfig, UI auto-updates on import

children.description: 运行 typecheck 确保无类型错误
children.evidence: npm run typecheck passes (both node + web)

children.description: 运行 vp check 确保格式/lint 正确
